MBANSaint Mary's University
About Me

Data-first.
Results-driven.

I'm a Master of Business Analytics student at Saint Mary's University, combining a foundation in accounting with a genuine curiosity for what data can reveal. I gravitate toward the intersection of business context and analytical rigour — where the numbers actually mean something to the people making decisions.

Over the past few years at Nova Scotia Power, I've developed a sharp eye for data quality, built reporting tools that teams actually use, and learned how to translate complex findings into plain language.

Outside of work, I enjoy exploring new technologies lately that's directed towards building agentic AI workflows and experimenting with LangChain. I believe the best analytical work isn't just technically sound — it's built with the end user in mind.

01 · Power BI
Sales Performance Dashboard — Contoso Retail

Designed and published interactive dashboards across 4 pages measuring sales, profitability, discounting, and returns across 306 stores globally. Built DAX measures using CALCULATE, SUMX, and FILTER; implemented KPI cards, drill-through views by country, a bilingual EN/FR toggle, and consistent layout formatting for end-user usability.

Power BIDAXKPIDrill-throughBilingual Toggle
1 / 2
02 · Analytics
Cruise Business Revenue & Financial Report

Built dashboards across 2 pages tracking total revenue, YTD performance vs. goals, cancellation rates, and reservation insights across cruise categories. Features customer segmentation by package, payment method distribution, and trend analysis across 10,000+ reservations.

Power BIRevenue AnalyticsSegmentationKPI
03 · Reporting
Project Management Performance Dashboard

Dashboards tracking benefits versus costs, task completion, and process improvement KPIs across 4 project types and 4 regions. Covers the full lifecycle from requirements to deployed report with dynamic filters and phase-level completion tracking.

Power BIKPI TrackingProcess ImprovementCost vs Benefit
04 · Excel / VBA
Cost–Benefit Analysis Model with Breakeven Chart

5-year financial model with automated calculations achieving a cost-to-benefit ratio of 1:2.8. Quantifies ROI across project costs, people costs, system costs, revenue income, and cost savings with a clear breakeven visualization for decision-makers.

ExcelVBAFinancial ModellingROIBreakeven
05 · Python / AI
PhD Outreach Workflow Automation

Built an end-to-end automated workflow using LangGraph and Python to replace a multi-step manual process. The system handles web scraping, data parsing, and includes a human-in-the-loop review stage deployed through a clean Streamlit interface. Demonstrates applied ETL and agentic process automation skills.

PythonLangGraphLangChainStreamlitETLWeb Scraping

▶ Watch Demo on LinkedIn
06 · Agentic AI
AI Travel Planning Application

Multi-API integration pulling live data from Google Maps, Google Places, Weather, and Air Quality APIs to generate fully structured travel plans. Built with LangChain and OpenAI, automating complex multi-step reasoning — reinforcing skills in data pipeline design, API integration, and agentic AI workflows.

PythonLangChainOpenAIGoogle APIsAgentic AI
